title: T1.3: Fix renderer None utilization guard — Add is-None-or guard at lines 189, 193 of tmux-claude-status. Files: scripts/tmux-claude-status [fix-cycle-2, renderer]

text: Acceptance: (1) Line 189: change "X" if fh_util == "X" to "X" if fh_util is None or fh_util == "X". (2) Same at line 193 for sd_util. (3) When utilization is None, renderer outputs "X%" instead of crashing.
